name: loop-engineering
description: Design & scaffold self-prompting agent loops (loop engineering). Interviews you about a task to automate, then generates the 6-step loop setup: loop-spec, a maker/checker Workflow, durable STATE.md, a schedule (/loop, /schedule, or GitHub Actions), explicit hard limits, and an eval log. Use when the user wants to automate, loop, or 'set on autopilot' a recurring task instead of prompting it by hand.
